headline: OpenAI Launches ChatGPT Images 2.0 with Advanced Reasoning Mode
summary: OpenAI announced the new image generation model ChatGPT Images 2.0 (gpt-image-2), which combines high visual fidelity with intelligent reasoning capabilities such as web search, generating multiple options, and self-reviewing results. The model is now available to all ChatGPT and Codex users and via API, supporting up to 2K resolution with better control over text and complex designs. 'Thinking' mode is available for Plus, Pro, and Enterprise users.
